Spokane g. Eastern Trust ca.


The officers and trustees of the
Washington Water Power company
were reelected yesterday at the an
nual meeting held in the company's
offices. The trustees elected were
H. M. Richards, J. P. M. Richards,
Thomas G. Thomson, A. B. Camp
bell, ]. d. Sherwood, j. N. Glover,
Huber Rasher, D. l.. Huntington
and w. A. White, Frank and George
Southland of New York. The Off.
GERS elected were: H. M. Richards,
president; A. B. Campbell, first vice
president; D. L. Huntington, second
vice president and general man
ager; H. E. Perks, treasurer, and
H. L. Blocker, secretary.
